# Acknowledgments {-}

This book is built with [bookdown](https://bookdown.org/) by Yihui Xie and the R Markdown community.
The wider R ecosystem — base R, the tidyverse, and the many domain-specific packages cited in the body — is the foundation on which every chapter rests.

The original lab and tutorial material that inspired this volume was authored under
the `CTTIR/courses` and `CTTIR/tutorials` repositories. Those repositories are credited in the Preface and at the points of use.

The decision-tree wizard hosted at `cttir.github.io/tutorials/decision-tree/`
draws structural inspiration from the University of Zurich's
*Methodenberatung* (methodenberatung.uzh.ch).

Drafting assistance from Anthropic's Claude was used during preparation;
all editorial decisions, errors, and omissions remain the author's.

<!-- TODO: name reviewers and contributors here once feedback is incorporated. -->
